items.question: What is an AI QR Code Generator?
items.answer: Our AI QR Code Generator creates functional QR codes with beautiful AI-generated backgrounds. Unlike plain black and white codes, ours combine functionality with stunning visual design.

items.question: How do I use the QR code generator?
items.answer: Simply enter your website URL, choose a background style, and click "Generate QR Code". The tool will create a scannable QR code with an AI-generated artistic background.

items.question: Are the generated QR codes scannable?
items.answer: Yes! Despite having beautiful backgrounds, all our QR codes maintain full scannability. We ensure proper contrast and positioning so any QR code scanner can read them.

items.question: Can I use these QR codes commercially?
items.answer: Absolutely! You can use the generated QR codes for any purpose including commercial use, marketing materials, business cards, menus, and promotional campaigns.

items.question: How can I share the QR codes?
items.answer: You can download the QR codes as high-resolution images and share them anywhere - social media, print materials, websites, or emails. They work on all devices and platforms.

items.question: What background styles are available?
items.answer: We offer multiple AI-generated background styles including artistic, modern, gradient, and themed designs. Each style is carefully crafted to maintain QR code readability.

items.question: Is the service free to use?
items.answer: Yes! Our AI QR Code Generator is completely free to use. Generate as many beautiful QR codes as you need without any cost or registration requirements.

items.question: What websites can I create QR codes for?
items.answer: You can create QR codes for any valid website URL - personal websites, business pages, social media profiles, online stores, menus, portfolios, and more.
